programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A couple (David Duchovny, Michelle Forbes) sets out on a cross-country trip to research a book about serial killers and, along the way, pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend (Brad Pitt, Juliette Lewis) who take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: The Mod Squad
programme.desc: Julie (Claire Danes), Pete (Giovanni Ribisi) and Linc (Omar Epps) are three problem teens headed to jail...until Captain Greer (Dennis Farina) offers them a deal to work for him and go undercover in the hip L.A. club scene. It’s a case that the cops can’t crack, but when Greer sends in his new task force – The Mod Squad – they quickly uncover a crime ring involving drugs, hookers...and dirty cops!

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.

programme.title: Out Of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington is caught in a web of intrigue as he investigates the murder of a woman he was seeing...and all the evidence points to him.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Buckaroo Banzai Across The 8th Dimension
programme.desc: In this cult classic, neurosurgeon, physicist and rock star Buckaroo Banzai (Peter Weller) is ready to save the world when the evil Red Lectroids -- led by the deranged Lord John Whorfin (John Lithgow) -- are unleashed from the 8th dimension.

programme.title: Dark Angel
programme.desc: Detective Jack Caine (Dolph Lundgren) thought he;d dealt with every kind of crime on earth, but someone "or something" is using human bodies to manufacture narcotics.

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe
programme.desc: The evil Skeletor (Frank Langella) is poised to conquer the universe. But fear not! He-Man (Dolph Lundgren) has declared war on Skeletor, and the battle between good and evil has come to Earth. Courtney Cox also stars in the epic, action-adventure.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Collision Course
programme.desc: Steve and Terri Irwin set out to save a crocodile, unaware that it’s swallowed a U.S. satellite beacon, and now they’re targets of the CIA! Crikey!

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Jessica Alba heat up the screen as two divers who dream of finding hidden treasure.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: In this homage to the great westerns, a cool-but-tough bouncer is out to clean up a seedy bar.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: The invasion has begun! Patrick Swayze, C. Thomas Howell, Lea Thompson and Charlie Sheen wage unremitting guerilla warfare in defense of their parents, their friends, their town and their country when Communist invaders storm their hometown.

programme.title: Red Dawn (2012)
programme.desc: In this thrilling remake of the 1984 movie, Spokane, Washington, is suddenly invaded by North Korea. Now under enemy occupation, a group of teens form a ragtag resistance unit determined to reclaim their town from its captors! Chris Hemsworth stars.
